random_single_cluster.approximation_notes: Single shared mask per layer from a uniformly random representative head (seed-controlled) instead of coverage-based selection. Mask built with top_p mass retention on the chosen head attention map.

moa.paper_source: Mixture-of-Attention / routed top-k head selection (routed sparse attention literature)
moa.approximation_notes: Proxy: per-layer shared mask from coverage-selected representative head, but mask retention uses top_k (fixed token budget per query row) instead of top_p. Does not implement true per-head MoA routing.

minference.paper_source: Jiang et al., MInference 1.0: Accelerating Pre-filling for Long-Context LLMs via Dynamic Sparse Attention (Microsoft, 2024)
minference.approximation_notes: Proxy: top_p_local mask (local band + cumulative mass) mimics MInference pattern-aware retention (A-shape / vertical+slash families) without full pattern classification per head.

flexprefill.paper_source: FlexPrefill: query/context-aware adaptive sparse prefill (adaptive top-p retention literature)
flexprefill.approximation_notes: Proxy: adaptive_top_p mask builder — top_p scales with query distance to sequence end (higher retention near query, lower for distant context). Does not implement full FlexPrefill block scheduling.

duoattention.paper_source: DuoAttention: retrieval heads vs streaming heads for long-context LLMs
duoattention.approximation_notes: Proxy: even-indexed heads receive sparse shared mask (streaming); odd-indexed heads remain full attention (retrieval). Representative head still chosen by coverage for mask construction.

dam.paper_source: Dynamic Attention Mask (DAM) — per-sample attention-map-derived sparse mask
dam.approximation_notes: Proxy: standard pipeline — per-sample dynamic mask from full-attention map of coverage-selected representative head with top_p=0.85. Matches native DAM-style map-to-mask without learned mask predictor.

survey_heads.paper_source: Attention head role/function survey literature (functional head taxonomy baselines)
survey_heads.approximation_notes: Proxy: fixed role-based representative head per layer — early layers use head 0 (sink-like), middle layers use mid head (pattern), late layers use last head (local/recency). No data-driven selection.
